title: Domain.com.au Batch Scraper
description: Scrape property listings from Domain.com.au - supports batch mode for efficiency

suburbs.title: Suburbs (Batch Mode)
suburbs.description: Array of suburbs to scrape in one run (more efficient than multiple single runs)

suburb.title: Suburb Name
suburb.description: Name of the suburb to scrape

state.title: State
state.description: Australian state code (nsw, vic, qld, etc.)

suburb.title: Suburb Name (Single Mode)
suburb.description: Single suburb to scrape (use 'suburbs' array for batch mode)

postcode.title: Postcode (Single Mode)
postcode.description: Australian postcode for single suburb mode

state.title: State
state.description: Australian state code (nsw, vic, qld, etc.)

maxRetries.title: Max Retries
maxRetries.description: Max retries per suburb on HTTP2 errors

delayBetweenSuburbs.title: Delay Between Suburbs (ms)
delayBetweenSuburbs.description: Delay in milliseconds between suburbs to avoid rate limiting

excludeUnderOffer.title: Exclude Under Offer
excludeUnderOffer.description: Exclude properties that are under offer
